entry.title: Tiwa Savage interview at BET Awards 2014

link.title: Tiwa Savage interview at BET Awards 2014

entry.content:
PROMO ENQUIRY Email: info@factory78.com
Website:
Subscribe it’s free:
Follow us:
Like on Facebook:
Instagram:
Factory78 live from The BET Experience 2014 Preview. We caught up with the nominees from Africa and the UK. Live performances from Ice Prince (Nigeria), Mafikizolo (South Africa), Sarkodie (Ghana) Tiwa Savage (Nigeria), Krept & Konan(UK) & Ghetts (UK) Plus US stars!
entry.summary: PROMO ENQUIRY Email: info@factory78.com Website: Subscribe it’s free: Follow us: Like on Facebook: Instagram: Factory78 live from The BET Experience 2014 Preview. We caught up with the nominees from Africa and the UK. Live performances from Ice Prince (Nigeria), Mafikizolo (South Africa), Sarkodie (Ghana) Tiwa Savage (Nigeria), Krept & Konan(UK) & Ghetts (UK) Plus US stars!

entry.title: PhonePe: How To Change Pin, Transaction Limit Per Day, Password Reset, Customer Care Number Details

link.title: PhonePe: How To Change Pin, Transaction Limit Per Day, Password Reset, Customer Care Number Details

entry.content:
Coronavirus has increased digital transactions in the country. The number of mobile wallet users has increased exponentially as more and more people are moving towards digital transactions for majority of payments. The Reserve Bank of India has issued data and said that the transactions from both mobile wallets and PPI cards increased by 45.3 percent.
► FOLLOW to Gizbot:
► Like us on Facebook:
► Follow us on Twitter:
► Follow us on Instagram:
► Subscribe Gizbot Youtube Channel:
► Follow us on Dailymotion:
"Music: www.bensound.com"

entry.title: Upa’s Hard Work, Modi’s Credit

link.title: Upa’s Hard Work, Modi’s Credit

entry.content:
As first five Rafale jets arrive India, Modi government races to take all the credit, forgetting the fact that Congress led government initiated the deal by identifying and purchasing the aircrafts. It is just another example of how PM Modi has been using UPA’s schemes to his on own credit and pro-welfare image building.
#Rafale #Modigovernment #Aircrafts #Congress #PMModi #IndianAirForce #MGNREGA
entry.summary: As first five Rafale jets arrive India, Modi government races to take all the credit, forgetting the fact that Congress led government initiated the deal by identifying and purchasing the aircrafts. It is just another example of how PM Modi has been using UPA’s schemes to his on own credit and pro-welfare image building. #Rafale #Modigovernment #Aircrafts #Congress #PMModi #IndianAirForce #MGNREGA

entry.title: Police search scene of triple shooting in London’s Broadwater Farm housing estate

link.title: Police search scene of triple shooting in London’s Broadwater Farm housing estate

entry.content:
Police were seen searching the scene of a triple shooting in London’s Broadwater Farm housing estate in Tottenham on Thursday (July 23).
Police were called to Griffin Road in the early hours of Thursday after shots were fired.
Three men suffered gunshot wounds, with one in a critical condition.
entry.summary: Police were seen searching the scene of a triple shooting in London’s Broadwater Farm housing estate in Tottenham on Thursday (July 23). Police were called to Griffin Road in the early hours of Thursday after shots were fired. Three men suffered gunshot wounds, with one in a critical condition.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s father lodges FIR against Riya Chakraborty

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s father lodges FIR against Riya Chakraborty

entry.content: A criminal case has been filed in Patna’s Rajiv Nagar police station on the statement of his father KK Singh in the suicide case of late actor Sushant Singh Rajput. A case has been registered under sections 341, 342, 380, 406, 420, 306 of IPC. In the case, K K Singh, father of Sushant Singh Rajput, has written in his application that he is not confident of the research being done by the Mumbai Police, he is alone and therefore doing research in this case from Patna Police Have asked to take action.
entry.summary: A criminal case has been filed in Patna’s Rajiv Nagar police station on the statement of his father KK Singh in the suicide case of late actor Sushant Singh Rajput. A case has been registered under sections 341, 342, 380, 406, 420, 306 of IPC. In the case, K K Singh, father of Sushant Singh Rajput, has written in his application that he is not confident of the research being done by the Mumbai Police, he is alone and therefore doing research in this case from Patna Police Have asked to take action.

entry.title: Sara Ali Khan की बचपन की Photos देख आप भी उनके Cuteness के हो जाएंगे कायल MUST WATCH Boldsky

link.title: Sara Ali Khan की बचपन की Photos देख आप भी उनके Cuteness के हो जाएंगे कायल MUST WATCH Boldsky

entry.content:
Sara Ali Khan was very cute in her childhood and her poses will keep you in shock. Sara Ali Khan is one of those star kids who is captured limelight at a very young age. Recently, Sara shared several photos from her childhood memories and now people are in awestruck.
हमारे देश में एक कहावत काफी मशहूर रही है, ‘पूत के पैर पालने में ही पता चल जाते हैं।’ इसका मतलब है कि बच्चा बड़ा होकर क्या करेगा, उसका अंदाजा वो बचपन से ही देने लगता है। बात अगर सारा अली खान की करें तो वो बचपन से ही नौटंकीबाज रही हैं। अपनी इस रिपोर्ट में हम आपको इस बात का सबूत भी देंगे। तो चलिए शुरू करते हैं, सिलसिला….
#SaraAliKhan #SaraAliKhanChildhoodPics #SaraAliKhanChildhoodMemories
entry.summary: Sara Ali Khan was very cute in her childhood and her poses will keep you in shock. Sara Ali Khan is one of those star kids who is captured limelight at a very young age. Recently, Sara shared several photos from her childhood memories and now people are in awestruck. हमारे देश में एक कहावत काफी मशहूर रही है, ‘पूत के पैर पालने में ही पता चल जाते हैं।’ इसका मतलब है कि बच्चा बड़ा होकर क्या करेगा, उसका अंदाजा वो बचपन से ही देने लगता है। बात अगर सारा अली खान की करें तो वो बचपन से ही नौटंकीबाज रही हैं। अपनी इस रिपोर्ट में हम आपको इस बात का सबूत भी देंगे। तो चलिए शुरू करते हैं, सिलसिला…. #SaraAliKhan #SaraAliKhanChildhoodPics #SaraAliKhanChildhoodMemories

entry.title: BSP MLAs Merger : Ashok Gehlot का Mayawati पर हमला Rajasthan Political Crisis वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: BSP MLAs Merger : Ashok Gehlot का Mayawati पर हमला Rajasthan Political Crisis वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Mayawati has a tremendous entry in the political riot of Rajasthan. The Congress has been fiercely targeting the merger of MLAs. In such a situation, Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot hit back at Mayawati. Ashok Gehlot said, 6 MLAs have merged on their own. I believe the rhetoric that BSP supremo Mayawati is doing is doing at the behest of BJP.
राजस्थान के सियासी दंगल में मायावती की जबरदस्त एंट्री हुई है. विधायकों के विलय के मामले पर कांग्रेस पर जमकर निशाना साध रही है. ऐसे में राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत ने मायावती पर पलटवार किया. अशोक गहलोत ने कहा, 6 विधायकों ने अपनी मर्जी से विलय किया है। मेरा मानना है कि बीएसपी सुप्रीमो मायावती जो बयानबाजी कर रही हैं वो बीजेपी के इशारे पर कर रही है।
#BSPMLAsMerger #AshokGehlot #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: Mayawati has a tremendous entry in the political riot of Rajasthan. The Congress has been fiercely targeting the merger of MLAs. In such a situation, Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot hit back at Mayawati. Ashok Gehlot said, 6 MLAs have merged on their own. I believe the rhetoric that BSP supremo Mayawati is doing is doing at the behest of BJP. राजस्थान के सियासी दंगल में मायावती की जबरदस्त एंट्री हुई है. विधायकों के विलय के मामले पर कांग्रेस पर जमकर निशाना साध रही है. ऐसे में राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत ने मायावती पर पलटवार किया. अशोक गहलोत ने कहा, 6 विधायकों ने अपनी मर्जी से विलय किया है। मेरा मानना है कि बीएसपी सुप्रीमो मायावती जो बयानबाजी कर रही हैं वो बीजेपी के इशारे पर कर रही है। #BSPMLAsMerger #AshokGehlot #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Sonu Sood Gifts Tractor to a Farmer Family

link.title: Sonu Sood Gifts Tractor to a Farmer Family

entry.content:
#SonuSood
#Tractor
#AndhraPradesh
ஆந்திர மாநிலம் சித்தூர் மாவட்டத்தில் ஏர் உழுவதற்கு மாடுகளை வாங்க காசு இல்லாததால் விவசாயி ஒருவர் தனது இரு மகள்களையும் மாடுகள் போல் பூட்டி ஏர் உழுத வீடியோ வைரலான நிலையில் அவருக்கு நடிகர் சோனு சூட் டிராக்டர் வாங்கி கொடுத்துள்ளார். இந்த டிராக்டரை பார்த்து விவசாயியின் குடும்பத்தினர் உருக்கமாக நன்றி தெரிவித்தனர்.
entry.summary: #SonuSood #Tractor #AndhraPradesh ஆந்திர மாநிலம் சித்தூர் மாவட்டத்தில் ஏர் உழுவதற்கு மாடுகளை வாங்க காசு இல்லாததால் விவசாயி ஒருவர் தனது இரு மகள்களையும் மாடுகள் போல் பூட்டி ஏர் உழுத வீடியோ வைரலான நிலையில் அவருக்கு நடிகர் சோனு சூட் டிராக்டர் வாங்கி கொடுத்துள்ளார். இந்த டிராக்டரை பார்த்து விவசாயியின் குடும்பத்தினர் உருக்கமாக நன்றி தெரிவித்தனர்.

entry.title: GHOST OF TSUSHIMA All Cutscenes (Game Movie)

link.title: GHOST OF TSUSHIMA All Cutscenes (Game Movie)

entry.content: Ghost of Tsushima is an upcoming action-adventure game developed by Sucker Punch Productions and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment for PlayStation 4. Featuring an open world for players to explore, it revolves around Jin Sakai, one of the last samurai on Tsushima Island during the first Mongol invasion of Japan in 1274. Venture beyond the battlefield to experience feudal Japan like never before. In this open-world action adventure, you’ll roam vast countrysides and expansive terrain to encounter rich characters, discover ancient landmarks, and uncover the hidden beauty of Tsushima.
entry.summary: Ghost of Tsushima is an upcoming action-adventure game developed by Sucker Punch Productions and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment for PlayStation 4. Featuring an open world for players to explore, it revolves around Jin Sakai, one of the last samurai on Tsushima Island during the first Mongol invasion of Japan in 1274. Venture beyond the battlefield to experience feudal Japan like never before. In this open-world action adventure, you’ll roam vast countrysides and expansive terrain to encounter rich characters, discover ancient landmarks, and uncover the hidden beauty of Tsushima.

entry.content: El delantero azteca es buscado por los Red Devils, y podría dejar a los Wolves la siguiente campaña

entry.title: How To DIY Bleached Dip-Dyed Denim At Home Elite Daily

link.title: How To DIY Bleached Dip-Dyed Denim At Home Elite Daily

entry.content:
In the age of sustainability, it can be hard to find secondhand styles that fulfill today’s trends. That’s why we asked BDG’s own Ryan Gale (@ryancgale) to show us how she up-cycles denim at home to give her old jeans a second life.
What you’ll need:
An old pair of jeans
Bleach
A bucket
Water
Gloves
An elastic tie
A plastic bag
Show us your looks by posting on social and tagging us - @bustle!
Watch more:
How To Box Braid Your Own Hair At Home (For Beginners):
Dry Skin Must-Haves, According To Beauty Experts:
What New York Creatives Always Pack In Their Bags:
entry.summary: In the age of sustainability, it can be hard to find secondhand styles that fulfill today’s trends. That’s why we asked BDG’s own Ryan Gale (@ryancgale) to show us how she up-cycles denim at home to give her old jeans a second life. What you’ll need: An old pair of jeans Bleach A bucket Water Gloves An elastic tie A plastic bag Show us your looks by posting on social and tagging us - @bustle! Watch more: How To Box Braid Your Own Hair At Home (For Beginners): Dry Skin Must-Haves, According To Beauty Experts: What New York Creatives Always Pack In Their Bags:

entry.title: India extends ban on International flights till August 31st Oneindia News

link.title: India extends ban on International flights till August 31st Oneindia News

entry.content: India on Friday extended the ban on international commercial passenger flights till August 31. Actress Rhea Chakraborty releases emotional video message. Sushant Singh Rajput’s father filed an FIR earlier this week against Rhea Chakraborty, accusing her of transferring money from his account and also mentally harassing him. Enforcement Directorate has lodged a money laundering case against Rhea Chakraborty and her family members. Sushant Singh Rajput’s family had accused Rhea of taking Rs 15 crore from the late actor. Former Jammu and Kashmir chief minister Mehbooba Mufti under detention since August 5 last year has been booked under the stringent Public Safety Act for another three months. At least 21 people have died in several districts of Punjab allegedly after consuming toxic liquor, prompting Chief Minister Amarinder Singh to order a high-level probe. Delhi Lieutenant Governor Anil Baijal on Friday rejected two moves by the Arvind Kejriwal government as part of the third phase of easing the COVID-19 lockdown.
entry.summary: India on Friday extended the ban on international commercial passenger flights till August 31. Actress Rhea Chakraborty releases emotional video message. Sushant Singh Rajput’s father filed an FIR earlier this week against Rhea Chakraborty, accusing her of transferring money from his account and also mentally harassing him. Enforcement Directorate has lodged a money laundering case against Rhea Chakraborty and her family members. Sushant Singh Rajput’s family had accused Rhea of taking Rs 15 crore from the late actor. Former Jammu and Kashmir chief minister Mehbooba Mufti under detention since August 5 last year has been booked under the stringent Public Safety Act for another three months. At least 21 people have died in several districts of Punjab allegedly after consuming toxic liquor, prompting Chief Minister Amarinder Singh to order a high-level probe. Delhi Lieutenant Governor Anil Baijal on Friday rejected two moves by the Arvind Kejriwal government as part of the third phase of easing the COVID-19 lockdown.

entry.title: PRAEW OOTD EP 06 เอาใจสาว mini size กับไอเดียรื้อตู้เสื้อผ้า

link.title: PRAEW OOTD EP 06 เอาใจสาว mini size กับไอเดียรื้อตู้เสื้อผ้า

entry.content: #PraewOOTD SPECIAL เอาใจสาว mini size กับไอเดียการรื้อตู้เสื้อผ้า หยิบเอาของเก่าสมัยคุณแม่ยังสาวออกมาแมทช์ชุดสไตล์เก๋กัน
entry.summary: #PraewOOTD SPECIAL เอาใจสาว mini size กับไอเดียการรื้อตู้เสื้อผ้า หยิบเอาของเก่าสมัยคุณแม่ยังสาวออกมาแมทช์ชุดสไตล์เก๋กัน

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput के खाते से 15 करोड़ गायब, Rhea Chakraborty से ED करेगी पूछताछ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput के खाते से 15 करोड़ गायब, Rhea Chakraborty से ED करेगी पूछताछ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
In Sushant Singh Rajput suicide case, the ED will now investigate about 15 crore rupees missing from Sushant’s account. Riya Chakraborty, who is facing charges in this entire case, may have to answer many questions. According to ED sources, the investigating agency will investigate on several points. Which includes the accounts of Sushant Singh’s account from Riya’s Source of Income and his brother’s companies. Watch video,
बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत सुसाइड मामले में ईडी अब सुशांत के खाते से गायब हुए 15 करोड़ रुपयों को लेकर जांच करेगी. इस पूरे मामले में आरोपों का सामना कर रहीं रिया चक्रवर्ती को कई सवालों का जवाब देना पड़ सकता है. ईडी सूत्रो के मुताबिक जांच एजेंसी कई बिंदुओं पर तफ्तीश करेगी. जिसमें सुशांत सिंह के अकाउंट के रुपयों से लेकर रिया की सोर्स ऑफ इनकम और उनके भाई की कंपनियां भी शामिल हैं. देखें वीडियो
#SushantSinghRajput #ED #RheaChakraborty
entry.summary: In Sushant Singh Rajput suicide case, the ED will now investigate about 15 crore rupees missing from Sushant’s account. Riya Chakraborty, who is facing charges in this entire case, may have to answer many questions. According to ED sources, the investigating agency will investigate on several points. Which includes the accounts of Sushant Singh’s account from Riya’s Source of Income and his brother’s companies. Watch video, बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत सुसाइड मामले में ईडी अब सुशांत के खाते से गायब हुए 15 करोड़ रुपयों को लेकर जांच करेगी. इस पूरे मामले में आरोपों का सामना कर रहीं रिया चक्रवर्ती को कई सवालों का जवाब देना पड़ सकता है. ईडी सूत्रो के मुताबिक जांच एजेंसी कई बिंदुओं पर तफ्तीश करेगी. जिसमें सुशांत सिंह के अकाउंट के रुपयों से लेकर रिया की सोर्स ऑफ इनकम और उनके भाई की कंपनियां भी शामिल हैं. देखें वीडियो #SushantSinghRajput #ED #RheaChakraborty

entry.title: Coronavirus : des faux clients pour garder la distance sociale dans les restaurants

link.title: Coronavirus : des faux clients pour garder la distance sociale dans les restaurants

entry.content:
Un restaurateur japonais a investi dans des mannequins en plastique. Son objectif ? Ne pas donner l’impression aux clients d’un restaurant vide à cause de la distance sociale.
Avec ce dispositif, il souhaite créer une atmosphère joviale et animée tout en respectant les mesures barrières afin d’attirer les clients.
La situation inquiète au Japon. Le nombre de cas au coronavirus ne fait qu’augmenter depuis plusieurs semaines.
entry.summary: Un restaurateur japonais a investi dans des mannequins en plastique. Son objectif ? Ne pas donner l’impression aux clients d’un restaurant vide à cause de la distance sociale. Avec ce dispositif, il souhaite créer une atmosphère joviale et animée tout en respectant les mesures barrières afin d’attirer les clients. La situation inquiète au Japon. Le nombre de cas au coronavirus ne fait qu’augmenter depuis plusieurs semaines.

entry.title: Bihar Flood: Muzaffarpur में बूढ़ी गंडक ने मचाई तबाही, टूट गया रिंग बांध वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Bihar Flood: Muzaffarpur में बूढ़ी गंडक ने मचाई तबाही, टूट गया रिंग बांध वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Since the rains in North Bihar, the rivers, which have been continuously flowing in the district, are slowly calming but still flowing above the danger mark but the old Gadak is flowing above the danger mark and the cost is increasing. Due to the breakdown of the old ring dam of Budhi Gandak near Vijay Chapra of Ahiyapur, flood water is spreading rapidly in dozens of villages of medical and surrounding loop.
उत्तर बिहार में हो रही बारिश के बाद से जिले में लगातार नदियां तांडव मचा रही बागमती धीरे धीरे शांत हो रही है लेकिन अभी भी खतरे के निशान से ऊपर बह रही है लेकिन बूढ़ी गडक खतरे के निशान काफी ऊपर बह रही है और लागातर बढ़ोतरी जारी है जिसके कारण अहियापुर के विजय छपरा के पास बूढ़ी गंडक का जर्जर रिंग बांध टूटने से मेडिकल और आस पाश के दर्जनों गांव में बाढ़ का पानी तेजी से फैल रहा है
#BiharFlood #BudhiGandak #Muzaffarpur
entry.summary: Since the rains in North Bihar, the rivers, which have been continuously flowing in the district, are slowly calming but still flowing above the danger mark but the old Gadak is flowing above the danger mark and the cost is increasing. Due to the breakdown of the old ring dam of Budhi Gandak near Vijay Chapra of Ahiyapur, flood water is spreading rapidly in dozens of villages of medical and surrounding loop. उत्तर बिहार में हो रही बारिश के बाद से जिले में लगातार नदियां तांडव मचा रही बागमती धीरे धीरे शांत हो रही है लेकिन अभी भी खतरे के निशान से ऊपर बह रही है लेकिन बूढ़ी गडक खतरे के निशान काफी ऊपर बह रही है और लागातर बढ़ोतरी जारी है जिसके कारण अहियापुर के विजय छपरा के पास बूढ़ी गंडक का जर्जर रिंग बांध टूटने से मेडिकल और आस पाश के दर्जनों गांव में बाढ़ का पानी तेजी से फैल रहा है #BiharFlood #BudhiGandak #Muzaffarpur

entry.title: Gérald Darmanin, un ministre de l’intérieur hyperactif

link.title: Gérald Darmanin, un ministre de l’intérieur hyperactif

entry.content: Le ministre de l’Intérieur multiplie les déplacements depuis sa nomination début juillet dans le gouvernement de Jean Castex. Ils ne semblent pas vouloir prendre de vacances. C’est un ministre super actif qui ressemble de plus en plus à son mentor, un certain Nicolas Sarkozy. Le ministre de l’Intérieur poursuit les déplacements un peu partout en France. Pour la première fois il se rendra ce vendredi en Italie et au Vatican à l’invitation de son homologue italien.
entry.summary: Le ministre de l’Intérieur multiplie les déplacements depuis sa nomination début juillet dans le gouvernement de Jean Castex. Ils ne semblent pas vouloir prendre de vacances. C’est un ministre super actif qui ressemble de plus en plus à son mentor, un certain Nicolas Sarkozy. Le ministre de l’Intérieur poursuit les déplacements un peu partout en France. Pour la première fois il se rendra ce vendredi en Italie et au Vatican à l’invitation de son homologue italien.

entry.title: Surprising Facts You May Not Know About Tequila

link.title: Surprising Facts You May Not Know About Tequila

entry.content:
5 facts you probably didn’t know about tequila.
Tequila is an alcohol derived from the blue agave plant.
The plant features a core called piña, which closely resembles a pineapple.
Once the piña is harvested, it is brought to a distillery to be roasted to unleash its juices.
Once those juices are released, they are fermented, distilled and aged before being bottled.
In order to be labeled tequila, the production of the liquor has to occur in the state of Jalisco or in some neighboring states.
entry.summary: 5 facts you probably didn’t know about tequila. Tequila is an alcohol derived from the blue agave plant. The plant features a core called piña, which closely resembles a pineapple. Once the piña is harvested, it is brought to a distillery to be roasted to unleash its juices. Once those juices are released, they are fermented, distilled and aged before being bottled. In order to be labeled tequila, the production of the liquor has to occur in the state of Jalisco or in some neighboring states.

entry.title: Mike Tyson Calls out Conor McGregor

link.title: Mike Tyson Calls out Conor McGregor

entry.content: Mike Tyson is calling out Conor McGregor before he’s even made his official return to fight Roy Jones Jr. in an exhibition match.
entry.summary: Mike Tyson is calling out Conor McGregor before he’s even made his official return to fight Roy Jones Jr. in an exhibition match.

entry.title: Jennifer Aniston and Brad Pitt got married and other events in history Oneindia News

link.title: Jennifer Aniston and Brad Pitt got married and other events in history Oneindia News

entry.content: The first Penguin paperback book was published in England, kick-starting the paperback revolution on July 30, 1935. Indian troops arrived in Jaffna in Sri Lanka to disarm the Tamil Tigers and enforce a peace pact. In 1987, retaliating against an increasingly insurgent movement, the Vadamarachchi Operation was launched against LTTE strongholds in Jaffna Peninsula. The operation involved nearly 4,000 troops, supported by helicopter gunships as well as ground-attack aircraft. In 2000, Aniston wed Brad Pitt but divorced him five years later after his alleged involvement with Angelina Jolie, whom he later married and divorced. Lance Armstrong became the 1st American to win three consecutive Tours de France.
entry.summary: The first Penguin paperback book was published in England, kick-starting the paperback revolution on July 30, 1935. Indian troops arrived in Jaffna in Sri Lanka to disarm the Tamil Tigers and enforce a peace pact. In 1987, retaliating against an increasingly insurgent movement, the Vadamarachchi Operation was launched against LTTE strongholds in Jaffna Peninsula. The operation involved nearly 4,000 troops, supported by helicopter gunships as well as ground-attack aircraft. In 2000, Aniston wed Brad Pitt but divorced him five years later after his alleged involvement with Angelina Jolie, whom he later married and divorced. Lance Armstrong became the 1st American to win three consecutive Tours de France.

entry.title: Reminding anyone that he is sick, is dangerous: Dr. Deepak

link.title: Reminding anyone that he is sick, is dangerous: Dr. Deepak

entry.content: Regarding the suicide of actor Sushant Singh Rajput in Bollywood and his mental state at that time, psychiatrist Dr. Deepak Raheja said, In today’s era, there is no cure for clinical depression. If people say in a place like Bollywood, it would be laughable. It is very dangerous to remind any mental patient that he is sick. We are told one thing from childhood that the blind should not be called blind. He should not be reminded again and again for any disability. #JusticeForSushant #DeshKiBahas
entry.summary: Regarding the suicide of actor Sushant Singh Rajput in Bollywood and his mental state at that time, psychiatrist Dr. Deepak Raheja said, In today’s era, there is no cure for clinical depression. If people say in a place like Bollywood, it would be laughable. It is very dangerous to remind any mental patient that he is sick. We are told one thing from childhood that the blind should not be called blind. He should not be reminded again and again for any disability. #JusticeForSushant #DeshKiBahas
